parsed.summary: XAUUSD: Trend-following engine signals short entry (forecast -0.586) on Monday open. Price trades below 200d SMA (down trend), supported by 21d momentum (+4.29%). However, 63d return is negative (-3.32%), indicating recent weakness reversal. Volatility elevated at 87th percentile (1y), consistent with vol-targeted positioning. Target position -1.0 from flat. 5d return modest (+0.74%), suggesting early-stage trend confirmation. No existing position to manage.
notable_risks: Elevated volatility (87th percentile) increases slippage and drawdown risk on entry
Negative 63d return conflicts with short signal; potential mean-reversion trap
5d momentum weak (+0.74%); trend may lack conviction below 200d SMA
notable_supports: 21d positive return (+4.29%) aligns with downtrend structure
Price below 200d SMA confirms directional bias
Validated engine with consistent trend-following logic
